prompt: Implement `lengthOfLongestSubstring(s: string): number` that returns the length of the longest substring without repeating characters.
canonicalSolution: export function lengthOfLongestSubstring(s: string): number { const seen = new Map<string, number>(); let best = 0, left = 0; for (let i = 0; i < s.length; i++) { const c = s[i]!; if (seen.has(c) && seen.get(c)! >= left) left = seen.get(c)! + 1; seen.set(c, i); best = Math.max(best, i - left + 1); } return best; }
